testcase.name: @AfterMethod tearDown
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.WebDriverException: Timed out waiting for driver server to stop. Build info: version: '4.10.0', revision: 'c14d967899' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.6' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [880393855f64cb63cc812fd3db66b7e6, quit {}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 114.0.5735.134, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 114.0.5735.90 (386bc09e8f4f..., userDataDir: C:\Users\mbkol\AppData\Loca...}, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:57780}, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:57780/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 114.0.5735.134, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 880393855f64cb63cc812fd3db66b7e6 at org.openqa.selenium.remote.service.DriverCommandExecutor.execute(DriverCommandExecutor.java:161) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.RemoteWebDriver.execute(RemoteWebDriver.java:531) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.RemoteWebDriver.execute(RemoteWebDriver.java:590) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.RemoteWebDriver.execute(RemoteWebDriver.java:594) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.RemoteWebDriver.quit(RemoteWebDriver.java:446) at org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver.quit(ChromiumDriver.java:341) at Testcases.Baseclass.tearDown(Baseclass.java:70) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1136) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:635) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:833) Caused by: java.util.concurrent.ExecutionException: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Process timed out after waiting for 20000 ms. testcase.name: Add_Employee1

failure.message: Cannot get a STRING value from a NUMERIC cell

testcase.failure: java.lang.IllegalStateException: Cannot get a STRING value from a NUMERIC cell at org.apache.poi.xssf.usermodel.XSSFCell.typeMismatch(XSSFCell.java:946) at org.apache.poi.xssf.usermodel.XSSFCell.getRichStringCellValue(XSSFCell.java:336) at org.apache.poi.xssf.usermodel.XSSFCell.getStringCellValue(XSSFCell.java:280) at Utilities.ReadConfig.ReadExcelData(ReadConfig.java:35) at Testcases.PIMPage.Add_Employee1(PIMPage.java:36) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1136) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:635) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:833) ...
